metadata.name: registry
metadata.description: OCCA Registry — Company, AgentIdentity, and Deployment accounts on Solana

instructions.name: commit_daily_anchor
docs: Commit a daily Merkle root anchor for a deployment's task hashes.
Per Whitepaper §2 trace architecture: per-task records live off-chain
in OCCA's database; this anchor proves OCCA didn't tamper with that
day's task list. Anyone can re-hash off-chain records and verify
against `merkle_root`.
Seeds: `["daily_anchor", deployment_pda, day_unix_le_i64]`.
PDA collision = at most one anchor per (deployment, day). Re-attempts
on the same key fail naturally (Anchor `init` rejects).
Authorization: signed by the Anchor Wallet registered as
`OperationsAccount[Anchor]` in the treasury program. The signer
pubkey must equal `operations.signer`; this ix's discriminator must
be in `operations.action_whitelist`. The OperationsAccount is
resolved via cross-program PDA lookup (`seeds::program = treasury::ID`).
Phase 1 rate limit: NOT enforced. Registry cannot mutate the
treasury-owned OperationsAccount's `signatures_this_period` counter
without an extra CPI. PDA collision (one per deployment+day) provides
natural deduplication; rent burn (~0.002 SOL each) caps griefing.
If a stronger rate limit becomes necessary, add a treasury CPI ix
`tick_anchor_signature` and wire it here.

accounts.name: deployment
docs: Deployment whose task stream this anchor covers.

accounts.name: company
docs: CompanyAccount referenced by deployment. Verified via
`deployment.company == company.key()` constraint in handler so we
can also resolve the OperationsAccount[Anchor] PDA.

accounts.name: anchor_signer
docs: Anchor Wallet — pubkey verified against `operations.signer`.

accounts.name: operations
docs: `OperationsAccount[Anchor]` from treasury program. Resolved via
cross-program PDA derivation. Anchor `Account<T>` auto-verifies
owner = treasury::ID via `OperationsAccount`'s `Owner` impl.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays rent for the DailyAnchorAccount PDA.

instructions.name: commit_trace
docs: Anchor a single completed, verified deliverable on-chain — per-task
provenance. Where `commit_daily_anchor` commits one Merkle root over
a day's task stream, this records ONE deliverable: a link to the
result, the content hash that locks it, and the verification verdict
+ quality score.
Only deliverables that PASSED the off-chain verification gate are
anchored (policy: keep unverified / spam output off the chain).
`verdict` is therefore always written `TRACE_VERDICT_PASSED`; failed
work is simply never committed through this ix.
Per Whitepaper §2 trace architecture: the deliverable itself stays
off-chain. `content_hash` makes the result tamper-evident and
`evidence_hash` locks the off-chain verification report. Anyone can
re-hash the artifact + report and verify against these. The on-chain
`quality_score` + `rubric_version` make the quality signal itself
tamper-evident — the agent cannot self-assert it.
Seeds: `["trace", task_id]`. PDA collision = at most one anchor per
task. Re-attempts on the same `task_id` fail naturally (Anchor `init`
rejects).
Authorization: identical model to `commit_daily_anchor` — signed by
the Anchor Wallet registered as `OperationsAccount[Anchor]`; this
ix's discriminator must be whitelisted on that account. Resolved via
cross-program PDA lookup (`seeds::program = treasury::ID`).
Phase 1 rate limit: NOT enforced (same constraint as
`commit_daily_anchor` — registry cannot mutate the treasury-owned
ops counter without an extra CPI). PDA-per-task dedup + rent burn
cap griefing.

accounts.name: deployment
docs: Deployment that produced this deliverable.

accounts.name: company
docs: CompanyAccount referenced by deployment. Verified via
`deployment.company == company.key()` in the handler so we can also
resolve the OperationsAccount[Anchor] PDA from it.

accounts.name: anchor_signer
docs: Anchor Wallet — pubkey verified against `operations.signer`.

accounts.name: operations
docs: `OperationsAccount[Anchor]` from treasury program. Resolved via
cross-program PDA derivation; Anchor `Account<T>` auto-verifies
owner = treasury::ID.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays rent for the TraceAnchorAccount PDA.

instructions.name: create_company
docs: Create a new CompanyAccount PDA + atomically initialize its
TreasuryAccount + PolicyAccount via CPI to the treasury program.
Per design §6: company creation never leaves a window where treasury
pointers are unset; any failure rolls back the entire transaction.
Seeds: `["company", owner, nonce_le_u32]`

accounts.name: owner
docs: Owning user wallet — signer to prevent PDA squatting.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays rent for company + treasury + policy PDAs.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: TreasuryAccount PDA — created by `treasury::init_treasury` CPI in
the handler. Seed/owner verification happens inside that program.

accounts.name: policy
docs: PolicyAccount PDA — created by `treasury::init_treasury` CPI.

accounts.name: treasury_program
docs: Treasury program — invoked via CPI to atomically init treasury+policy.

instructions.name: create_deployment
docs: Create a Deployment binding an existing AgentIdentity to a Company.
Seeds: `["deployment", company_pda, deployment_index_le_u32]`
`deployment_index` is a per-company u32 counter — caller picks
the next free index. Same identity may be deployed multiple times
in the same company (e.g. retired then re-deployed) — each gets
its own index.
Constraint: `identity.owner == company.owner`. Both fields are
immutable, so this binding is permanent.

accounts.name: company
docs: Company the agent is being deployed into. Referenced only — the
company owner's consent to the hire is captured off-chain (the
invite), so the company owner is NOT a required signer here.

accounts.name: identity
docs: AgentIdentity being deployed. The IDENTITY owner signs — deploying
an agent (incl. into another owner's company, the marketplace case)
is authorized by the agent's owner accepting.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Agent owner (signer) — authorizes deploying THEIR agent.

instructions.name: register_agent_identity
docs: Mint a new AgentIdentity PDA.
Seeds: `["agent_identity", agent_pubkey]`
`agent_pubkey` is a caller-supplied identifier (typically derived
from a generated keypair held by the user wallet). It is the
stable identity of the agent across deployments. The recorded
`owner` is immutable — there is no transfer instruction.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Identity owner (= user wallet that minted this identity).

instructions.name: retire_deployment
docs: Retire a deployment. Terminal — once retired, this Deployment
PDA is read-only forever (preserves history). To re-engage the
same identity in the same company, create a new deployment with
the next deployment_index.

instructions.name: set_agent_receiving_address
docs: Set or replace the agent's PERSONAL receiving wallet — the passive
destination for funds disbursed to this agent, intrinsic to the
identity (no company/deployment required). Pass `Pubkey::default()`
to clear. Identity-owner only. NEVER a signer — it only receives.

instructions.name: set_receiving_address
docs: Set or replace the deployment's receiving address — the passive
destination wallet that funds disbursed *to* this agent land in.
Pass `Pubkey::default()` to clear. Owner-only. NEVER a signer:
this address does not authorize on-chain actions, it only receives.

instructions.name: update_agent_identity_metadata
docs: Update identity metadata (rename, change persona, etc.).
Identity-owner only.

instructions.name: update_company_metadata
docs: Update company metadata (name / locale / off-chain pointer).
Owner-only. Use to rename, update brand assets, etc.

instructions.name: update_company_status
docs: Pause / resume a company. Paused companies should be skipped by
dispatchers off-chain. Owner-only.

instructions.name: update_deployment_metadata
docs: Update deployment metadata (role, off-chain pointer).
Owner-only.

instructions.name: update_deployment_status
docs: Toggle deployment between Active and Paused. Owner-only.
Use `retire_deployment` for terminal transition.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: signer does not match the account owner

errors.name: NameRequired
errors.msg: name is required

errors.name: NameTooLong
errors.msg: name exceeds MAX_NAME_LEN

errors.name: LocaleTooLong
errors.msg: locale exceeds MAX_LOCALE_LEN

errors.name: RoleRequired
errors.msg: role is required

errors.name: RoleTooLong
errors.msg: role exceeds MAX_ROLE_LEN

errors.name: MetadataUriTooLong
errors.msg: metadata_uri exceeds MAX_METADATA_URI_LEN

errors.name: InvalidStatus
errors.msg: invalid status value

errors.name: DeploymentRetired
errors.msg: deployment is retired and cannot be modified

errors.name: IdentityOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: identity owner does not match company owner

errors.name: EmptyAnchor
errors.msg: daily anchor must cover at least one task

errors.name: InvalidDayBoundary
errors.msg: day_unix must be > 0 and aligned to 00:00:00 UTC (multiple of 86400)

errors.name: FutureAnchor
errors.msg: daily anchor cannot be for a future day

errors.name: DeploymentNotActive
errors.msg: deployment must be active to commit anchor

errors.name: CompanyMismatch
errors.msg: deployment.company does not match passed company account

errors.name: OperationsRevoked
errors.msg: operations account is revoked

errors.name: OperationsExpired
errors.msg: operations account is past its expiry

errors.name: WrongOperationsKind
errors.msg: operations account kind does not match instruction expectation

errors.name: DiscriminatorNotWhitelisted
errors.msg: instruction discriminator is not whitelisted on operations account

errors.name: InvalidDiscriminator
errors.msg: could not parse instruction discriminator

errors.name: ResultUriTooLong
errors.msg: result_uri exceeds MAX_RESULT_URI_LEN

errors.name: InvalidQualityScore
errors.msg: quality_score exceeds MAX_QUALITY_SCORE (0-100)

errors.name: InvalidCompletedAt
errors.msg: completed_at must be > 0 and not in the future

fields.name: version
docs: Schema version.

fields.name: agent_pubkey
docs: Stable identity key — also baked into the PDA seed.

fields.name: owner
docs: Owning user wallet. Immutable — set at mint and never changes.

fields.name: receiving_address
docs: The agent's PERSONAL receiving wallet — a passive destination for
funds disbursed to this agent, intrinsic to the identity (like a
person's bank account). Owner-set anytime via
`set_agent_receiving_address`, independent of any company/deployment.
At `create_deployment` the deployment's `receiving_address` defaults
to this. `Pubkey::default()` = unset. NEVER a signer.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp at mint.

fields.name: updated_at
docs: Unix timestamp of last state mutation.

fields.name: name
docs: Display name (e.g. "Aiden"). Not unique — identities are
disambiguated by `agent_pubkey`.

fields.name: metadata_uri
docs: Off-chain metadata URI — persona, avatar, public bio.

fields.name: metadata_hash
docs: SHA-256 of metadata JSON.

fields.name: reputation_uri
docs: Pointer to ReputationAccount (Phase 2). Empty string = unminted.

fields.name: version
docs: Schema version — bump on field changes.

fields.name: owner
docs: Owning user wallet — also baked into the PDA seed.

fields.name: treasury
docs: Pointer to TreasuryAccount PDA (Pubkey::default() until Phase 2).

fields.name: policy
docs: Pointer to PolicyAccount PDA (Pubkey::default() until Phase 2).

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp at creation.

fields.name: updated_at
docs: Unix timestamp of last state mutation.

fields.name: nonce
docs: Seed disambiguator — same owner can register multiple companies.

fields.name: status
docs: Active=0, Paused=1.

fields.name: name
docs: Display name.

fields.name: locale
docs: BCP-47 locale tag for default UI rendering ("en", "id", ...).

fields.name: metadata_uri
docs: Off-chain metadata URI (IPFS / Arweave / HTTPS) — extended profile,
brand assets, etc.

fields.name: metadata_hash
docs: SHA-256 of canonical metadata JSON for integrity verification.

fields.name: version
docs: Schema version.

fields.name: deployment
docs: Deployment whose task stream this anchor covers.

fields.name: company
docs: CompanyAccount the deployment belongs to (denormalized for fast
indexing — avoids a deployment-account fetch on read).

fields.name: day_unix
docs: Unix timestamp of 00:00:00 UTC for the day this anchor covers.
Aligned by `day_unix % 86_400 == 0` constraint at commit time.

fields.name: merkle_root
docs: Merkle root over that day's task hashes (off-chain DB).

fields.name: task_count
docs: Number of leaves (tasks) in the Merkle tree. Must be > 0 — empty
days produce no anchor (§2).

fields.name: committed_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this commit landed on-chain.

fields.name: committed_by
docs: Anchor Wallet pubkey that signed the commit. Mirror of
`OperationsAccount[Anchor].signer` at commit time.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for PDA verification.

fields.name: version
docs: Schema version.

fields.name: agent_identity
docs: AgentIdentity PDA this deployment belongs to.

fields.name: company
docs: CompanyAccount PDA this deployment belongs to.

fields.name: deployment_index
docs: Per-company counter — also part of the PDA seed.

fields.name: owner
docs: Mirror of `company.owner` for fast single-account auth checks.

fields.name: receiving_address
docs: Passive destination wallet for funds disbursed *to* this agent
(Agent Receiving Address per Whitepaper §8.2 v0.10). NOT a signer
— never authorizes on-chain actions. Treasury disburse instructions
match against this field to identify intra-company transfers and
deduct the Agent Operating Fee. `Pubkey::default()` = unset
(disbursements to this deployment will fail until set).

fields.name: adapter_id
docs: Pinned adapter (Pubkey::default() = unspecified).

fields.name: role
docs: Capability persona / function tag (e.g. "ceo", "sdr"). NOT a
job title — see Whitepaper §15.7 + CLAUDE.md naming guardrails.

fields.name: parent_deployment_index
docs: Reporting parent within the company (None = top-level).

fields.name: status
docs: Active=0, Paused=1, Retired=2 (terminal).

fields.name: deployed_at
docs: Unix timestamp when deployment was created.

fields.name: retired_at
docs: Unix timestamp when retired (0 = still active).

fields.name: updated_at
docs: Unix timestamp of last state mutation.

fields.name: metadata_uri
docs: Off-chain metadata URI — model preferences, skill list, etc.

fields.name: metadata_hash
docs: SHA-256 of metadata JSON.

fields.name: kind
docs: What kind of operations key this is (Disbursement | Anchor).
Also encoded into the PDA seed so each company can host one of each.

fields.name: signer
docs: Pubkey of the registered wallet:
• Disbursement: operator-held only — OCCA never holds the privkey.
• Anchor: shared session key — operator + OCCA both hold privkey,
either can sign `commit_daily_anchor` (capability-scoped).

fields.name: action_whitelist
docs: Whitelist of allowed instruction discriminators (8-byte Anchor
discriminators). Defaults set at registration:
• Disbursement: `[disburse_routine]`
• Anchor:       `[commit_daily_anchor]` (lives in Registry program)

fields.name: current_period_anchor
docs: Unix timestamp of start-of-current-month UTC. `0` = uninitialized.

fields.name: expiry_unix
docs: Hard expiry (unix timestamp). `0` = no expiry.

fields.name: revoked
docs: Once true, all future signatures via this account are rejected.
Rotation flow: revoke → close → re-create with new `signer`.

types.name: TraceAnchorAccount
docs: Per-deliverable provenance record. One per completed, verified task.
The deliverable content lives off-chain; this account locks its
identity, content hash, and verified quality so it is tamper-evident
and attributable. Reputation views are derived off-chain by folding
over these accounts per `agent`.

fields.name: version
docs: Schema version.

fields.name: task_id
docs: Hash of task creation params — globally unique task id, also baked
into the PDA seed.

fields.name: company
docs: CompanyAccount the work was produced in (denormalized for indexing).

fields.name: agent
docs: AgentIdentity PDA that produced the deliverable. Reputation
aggregates against this (stable across redeployments), NOT the
per-company deployment.

fields.name: deployment
docs: Deployment PDA active when the work was produced (company context).

fields.name: result_uri
docs: Link to the deliverable (article URL, PR, etc). Off-chain pointer.

fields.name: content_hash
docs: SHA-256 of the deliverable content at completion — tamper-evidence
for the result behind `result_uri`.

fields.name: verdict
docs: Verification verdict. Always `TRACE_VERDICT_PASSED` — only passed
deliverables are anchored.

fields.name: quality_score
docs: Rubric quality score 0-100 (see `MAX_QUALITY_SCORE`). Tamper-evident
quality signal, produced by the deterministic gate, not the agent.

fields.name: rubric_version
docs: Version of the scoring rubric that produced `quality_score`. Scores
are only comparable within the same rubric version.

fields.name: evidence_hash
docs: SHA-256 of the off-chain verification report (claims checked +
sources). Lets anyone audit WHY the verdict/score was assigned.

fields.name: completed_at
docs: Unix timestamp the deliverable was completed off-chain.

fields.name: committed_at
docs: Unix timestamp this commit landed on-chain.

fields.name: committed_by
docs: Anchor Wallet pubkey that signed the commit. Mirror of
`OperationsAccount[Anchor].signer` at commit time.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for PDA verification.
